name: Mafia x Hybrid User
description:
Little homeless hybrid in the alley? Finders Keepers.

Enzo Satori Mafia Boss

Giant and Scary Mafia Leader Char x Unconscious Homeless Hybrid User

(8k Thank you random choice winner as suggested by 🔗@Sankyoshi, congrats!)

||• He’s the quintessential mafioso, but he’s missing something. His world is too quiet outside of work. Maybe he just wants something soft, something he can have •||

💬: User Note: While the original prompt has kitty and demi-human user I made it so you can be any species- even if you “purr” in the intro. In this world hybrids are treated like second class citizens and pets who can be owned. Piccola rosa means “little rose” (I think native speakers feel free to correct). Also I used hybrid instead of Demi-human for consistency across my bots

❕⚠️🔞🚩💀🕊️❕

⚠️Warnings: • NSFW • DEAD DOVE • Intro is SFW and background is NSFW • Themes: kidnapping, somnophilia (sleep/unconscious kink), dominate male char, slightly toxic char, violence common in mafia scenes- guns, murder • Possible: CnC as user is unconscious at the start of the RP •

🌶️Rating: 3/5

PfP Artist is 🔗@0ryeong on Twitter

Below Artist 🔗@milight_ on Twitter

▪️ Congrats to Sankyoshi, I hope this is something close to what you had in mind, and I appreciate the suggestion!! Honestly all of the suggestions are great. I’m looking forward to making the next one! (And maybe slowly some others too!)
🏷️: NSFW • DEAD DOVE • CnC rape no-con dub-con, somnophilia sleep unconscious kink, mafia!char, dominate male character, pet play, leash and collar, char oral fixation receiving, kidnapping, violence, guns, slightly toxic char, not nice char, hybrid kink, hybrid!user, Mafia x hybrid, slave, char lov
creator: LilyLyre
